Why Eve Laser YYC

The boutique standard, run like a clinic.

01

Premium technology only

American-made Venus Velocity for laser, Canadian-made Apilus Senior 3G for electrolysis — no budget devices, ever.

02

Honest consultations

If a treatment isn't right for your skin or goals, we'll say so and recommend what actually is.

03

Personalized plans

Your protocol is built around your skin, hair, and history — not a fixed package.

04

Comfort-first protocols

Modern settings and technique prioritize a comfortable session without compromising results.

05

Transparent pricing

You'll know the full cost and expected timeline before you commit to anything.

06

Downtown, and discreet

A clean, quiet studio on 5 Avenue SW — easy to reach, easy to feel at ease in.

Our Services

Three specialties. One standard of care.

01 / Laser

Laser Hair Removal

Medical-grade Venus Velocity technology for fast, comfortable, long-term hair reduction across all skin types.

View treatment →
02 / Electrolysis

Permanent Electrolysis

The only FDA-recognized method of truly permanent hair removal, delivered on Canada's Apilus Senior 3G.

View treatment →
03 / Aesthetics

Medical Aesthetics

Facials, peels, microneedling, and skin consultations designed around long-term skin health.

View treatments →
Treatment 01

Laser Hair Removal

Delivered on the Venus Velocity, an American-engineered medical-grade laser built for consistent, comfortable results across a wide range of skin tones.

  • Faster sessions, thanks to a larger, more efficient treatment spot
  • Comfort-focused technology with integrated cooling
  • Suitable for most skin types, assessed individually at consultation
  • Built for long-term, reliable hair reduction — not a one-time fix
  • Treatment areas include face, underarms, legs, arms, bikini, and back
Book Online Ask a Question
Device on file

Venus Velocity

Manufactured in the United States
CategoryMedical-grade laser
CoolingIntegrated contact cooling
Skin typesBroad range, assessed per client
Session paceFast, large treatment spot
Intended outcomeLong-term hair reduction
Device on file

Apilus Senior 3G

Manufactured in Canada
CategoryAdvanced electrolysis system
Hair colour rangeAll, including grey & blonde
Skin typesAll Fitzpatrick I–VI
MethodPrecision, single-follicle treatment
Intended outcomePermanent hair removal
Treatment 02

Permanent Electrolysis

Electrolysis remains the only method recognized as permanent for every hair colour and skin type — delivered here on the Apilus Senior 3G, one of the world's leading systems.

  • Effective on hair laser can't treat: grey, blonde, and very fine hair
  • Precise, single-follicle technique for genuinely permanent results
  • Comfortable modern protocols, not the electrolysis of decades past
  • Well suited to facial hair, brows, and other detail-sensitive areas
  • Available with our specialist electrolysis technician
Book Online Ask a Question
Treatment 03

Medical Aesthetics

Custom Facials

Tailored to your skin's condition that day — not a fixed routine repeated every visit.

Deep Cleansing

A thorough clinical cleanse that clears congestion without stripping the skin barrier.

Chemical Peels

Graduated peel strengths to brighten tone and texture with predictable, minimal downtime.

Microneedling

Collagen-stimulating treatment for texture, scarring, and early signs of aging.

Scalp Microneedling

Targeted stimulation for thinning areas and overall scalp health.

Intimate Care Treatments

Discreet, specialized care delivered with the same clinical standard as every other service.

Facial Massage

Sculpting, lymphatic-focused massage to de-puff and restore natural contour.

Skin Consultation

A one-on-one assessment that maps a realistic plan before any treatment begins.

Equipment

We invest in the instrument, not just the treatment.

Laser hair removal

Venus Velocity

StrengthSpeed & comfort
Best forLarger areas, most skin tones

Permanent electrolysis

Canada · Advanced electrolysis
StrengthTrue permanence, any colour
Best forFine detail, grey/blonde hair

Not sure which is right for you? That's exactly what the consultation is for — we'll recommend the technology suited to your hair and skin, not the one we'd rather sell.

Reviews

What clients notice first.

★★★★★

I've done laser for three years elsewhere with barely any results. One session here and I could finally see a real difference — so glad I found a good technician in Calgary.

Two weeks after my session and there wasn't a single hair left — no redness, no irritation, the whole time.

★★★★★

03

Treatment

Sessions are scheduled around your life, tracked over time, and adjusted as your skin responds.
